topic: My,Oh. Band OSINT and Merchandise Tracking
axioms: Members: Carmen Norgate and Mark Currie
Released an album in Sept 2011 at Glue Gallery
Released merchandise, need to track it down
lateral_prism: OSINT View: Find social media footprints, Bandcamp, old Facebook pages, Wayback Machine archives for 'Glue Gallery' or 'Mou Very' gigs.
Merch View: Look for local Dunedin screenprinters active in 2011, vintage NZ band shirt archives (like AudioCulture), or local marketplace listings (TradeMe).
Network View: Track down Carmen Norgate and Mark Currie's current whereabouts to see if they hold deadstock.
plan: Identify band discography and online presence (Bandcamp, Soundcloud).
Identify specific merchandise items produced (shirts, physical CDs).
Locate current contact info or archives for the band members.
